Name: Penrose Point
Notes: Coolest site in the eight-site rotation. Historical reference for the cool end of the temperature gradient. Values reprocessed under the 2024-11 v4.1 mask tightening and the 2026-03 scan-line drift correction; committee package must cite the reprocessed value.

Name: Salmon Beach
Region: Point Defiance / Narrows, South Puget Sound
Notes: Cool-end reference alongside Penrose Point. Reprocessed under both mask tightening and scan-line drift correction.

Name: Joemma Beach
Notes: Mid-gradient site. Reprocessed under both corrections.

Name: Days Island
Region: Point Defiance / Narrows, South Puget Sound
Notes: Mid-gradient site. Reprocessed under both corrections.

Name: Dash Point
Region: Federal Way / Poverty Bay, South Puget Sound
Notes: Mid-gradient site. Not the cool end of the gradient. Reprocessed under both corrections.

Name: Narrows Cove
Region: Point Defiance / Narrows, South Puget Sound
Notes: Warm-end mid-gradient site. Reprocessed under both corrections.

Name: Titlow Beach
Notes: Focal site for the 2025-2026 warming survey. Four authoritative visits on 2025-06-14, 2025-07-19, 2025-08-23, and 2026-01-11 (observer A. Santos, protocol SOP CE-04 v2.1, 0.25 x 0.25 m quadrat). Never marked Reprocessed.

Name: Owen Beach
Notes: Warmest site in the eight-site rotation. Warm end of the temperature gradient. Reprocessed under both corrections.
